# CurrentBalance.available(_:)

**Case**

Only the available balance is present.

## Declaration

```swift
case available(Balance)
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **CurrentBalance.availableAndBooked(available:booked:)**: Both available and booked balances are present.
- **CurrentBalance.booked(_:)**: Only the booked balance is present.

items.description: Both available and booked balances are present.
items.name: CurrentBalance.availableAndBooked(available:booked:)

items.description: Only the booked balance is present.
